Document:
# Service
[color=#9fed58]Service[/color] has perhaps the most important job of all: keeping the crew both fed and topped up on booze.
## Personnel [color=#9fed58]Service[/color]'s staff is made up of Bartenders, Botanists, Chefs and Service Workers. Service is run by the [bold]Head of Personnel[/bold], who also manages [textlink="other minor jobs" link="Civilian"/] to a lesser degree.
## Working Together [color=#9fed58]Service[/color], tends to be the most [color=#a4885c]interlinked[/color] department by far. Most [color=#9fed58]Service[/color] jobs require [color=#a4885c]cooperation[/color] between workers. Chefs often need ingredients that only botanists can grow efficiently. The bartender may request bananas for special cocktails.
A lot of [color=#a4885c]collaboration[/color] is necessary within and without [color=#9fed58]Service[/color]. Often times, [color=#9fed58]Service[/color] is required by other departments, so be on your toes.
By far the most common departments to work with [color=#9fed58]Service[/color] are [color=#a46106]Cargo[/color] and [color=#5b97bc]Medical[/color].
